allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update roadmap: add Remote Crawling, fix Phase 2 status

- Add Phase 2.5: Remote Crawling section \(complete\)
- Mark Entity Search API as done \(already implemented\)
- Update Phase 4.1 database strategy to reflect ddl-auto approach
- Update CLAUDE.md Phase 2 remaining items
- Add deferred items table for remote crawling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add configuration reference doc

Creates docs/reference/configuration.md covering:
- Server, database, batch, NLP, security settings
- Environment variable overrides
- Profile configuration \(auto-detected OS profiles\)
- Common configurations \(dev, production\)

Resolves broken links in commands.md and troubleshooting.md.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
